audit_items.proof_trace: The balance-based end condition is guarded by `isPriceValid` (line 251), deviating from the unconditional assertion. However, when the price feed is invalid, `bid()` also reverts via `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` (withValidation=true, PriceManager.sol:409-416), so no bids can drain the auction to dust — removing all attack surface for the omitted condition. The duration-based end fires unconditionally regardless of price validity, serving as a guaranteed fallback.
